summary_en: 404,100 ordinary shares cancelled (3.9% of shares outstanding pre-cancellation). Post-cancellation issued share count: 10,085,374 shares. Effective date: May 29, 2026.
title_en: Notice regarding cancellation of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: Kyowa Nissei Co., Ltd. announced on May 29, 2026 the cancellation of 404,100 treasury ordinary shares, representing 3.9% of shares outstanding (calculated excluding treasury shares) prior to cancellation. The shares were initially acquired by the company under a board resolution dated May 14, 2026, via ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange trading for a total consideration of 560,082,600 yen. Following the cancellation, the company's total issued share count stands at 10,085,374 shares (excluding remaining treasury shares of 256,826 shares). The cancellation was executed on the same date as announced and was authorized under Article 178 of the Companies Act.
